name: Strange Monsters Memory
short_description: A simple Memory match game with monsters where you will be tested with 4 different game difficulties. Try to achieve the best time with less tries in each mode and collect all the monsters!
detailed_description:
This game is just what it seems: a simple card matching game that I made using my drawings. 80% of what you see in game is hand drawn by me, the cards, the words and even some UI/UX, (20% are just some of the UI I made digitally for the store). This game was born as an experiment, to see if I could not only make a video game, but also make it while only using art sprites directly scanned from paper. 

As I said this game is pretty easy, you just need to find all the couples. There are 4 different modes that will test your mnemonic skills and some achievements that only a Real M.M.M can accomplish. Oh wait you don't know what "M.M.M" stands for?... Well I guess you should really try it then!

Last but not least thing to mention is that each mode has a timer and an attempt counter that will allow you to realize your current skill. Every game you win will save your best time and tries. Try to get the best score possible out of all game modes!
